title: Presence Protocol — WitnessEntry
description: One entry in the hash-linked witness chain.

prevHash.description: Hash of the previous entry; for genesis, sixty-four zeroes.

eventType.description: Conventionally one of `session_started`, `outcome`, `vault_set`; arbitrary strings allowed for `hestia_request_witness`.

eventData.description: Implementation-defined payload. Spec §3 specifies shape per event_type.

signerLct.description: LCT of the signer. For Hestia: sovereign LCT placeholder. For Hardbound: hardware-attested LCT.
